blocks.content: On the inner wall of the Hall of Corruption stood Kariel, Uriel, and Surt, the leader of the fire giants.
Since the place wasn't designed for war, the inner wall was higher than the outer wall, offering a clear view of the endless plains beyond.
A massive drawbridge, 1 kilometer wide and 4 kilometers long, spanned the great river crossing the plains, branching into seven paths symbolizing the seven sins, leading to all the gates of Lakia.
Gaold's party would likely enter through one of these seven paths.
The end of these paths was exactly 10 kilometers from this point.
But in some ways, this calculation was meaningless.
No one here believed Gaold would actually show up.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: It's still peaceful. Well, that's to be expected. How are the troops distributed?
